tags: weapon actor ammo current max zero needed projectile fire player cast fpp montage firing sound
catalog_description: BP_WeaponBase: Actor-based blueprint with 9 functions. Handles animation, movement, equipment, and audio.
name: BP_WeaponBase

variables.name: Weapon_ADS_FOV
variables.description: Your default FOV gets divided by this float, the result will be the ADS FOV. For example: 90 / 1.5 = 60

variables.name: ProjectileSpawnsFromCamera
variables.description: If enabled, the projectile will spawn from the center of the camera. If disabled, it will spawn the the Muzzle location from the gun.

variables.name: DelayTimeBetweenShots
variables.description: If this is set to 0, non-automatic weapons will be able to fire as fast as you can pull the trigger.

variables.name: BulletSpreadWalkingMultiplier
variables.description: When the player is walking, the bullet spread can be increased using this multiplier (to cancel it out use 1).

variables.name: Damage_CriticalHitMultiplierForHitscan
variables.description: Critical hit for projectiles is set in the projectile child classes.

variables.name: Weapon_Fire_Montage
variables.description: This is for weapons animation montages.

variables.name: Weapon_Reload_Montage
variables.description: This is for weapons animation montages.

variables.name: WeaponSwappingSpeedMultiplier
variables.description: Use this float to adjust the speed of the switching montages (it's a playrate multiplier).

variables.name: Legacy_Right_Arm_Rotation
variables.description: Sometimes a weapon is too long and you want to rotate the barrel slightly, to center it more precise in relation to the crosshair. This has little to no gameplay effect, it's just to slightly rotate the right arm.

variables.name: Use_Custom_IK_ForFPS_LeftHand
variables.description: If you have pre-made animations for firing, the IK sometimes cause issues, as it tries to play the Montage and keep the IK at the same time, in that case you can disable it here.

variables.name: ADS_Correction
variables.description: Use this float to adjust the ADS height of the weapon.

variables.name: Legacy_Left_Hand_Rotation
variables.description: Use this to rotate the left hand position if the weapon has a vertical grip.

variables.name: ADS_Translation_X
variables.description: Fine-tune ADS on X axis.

variables.name: ADS_Translation_Y
variables.description: Fine-tune ADS on Y axis.

variables.name: WeaponAnimCategory
variables.description: This ENUM tells the AnimBP to switch poses for different kind of weapons, if you have pre-made animations for each gun, add them to the E_WeaponCategory ENUM

variables.name: Use_Custom_IK_ForTPS_LeftHand
variables.description: If you have pre-made animations for firing, the IK sometimes cause issues, as it tries to play the Montage and keep the IK at the same time, in that case you can disable it here.

variables.name: ADS_SlowdownModifier
variables.description: This value modifies the speed at which the mouse and gamepad will move when aiming, in general keep this at 2.0, but if you want snipers for example to move slower then make it 6.0 or so.

variables.name: Weapon_Weight_Modifier
variables.description: This float is used to make the character walk slightly faster or slower depending what weapon is being carried. See WASD graph on the character base where it adds movement input. Your fastest weapon should have a value of 1.0

variables.name: ReloadDurationFPP_MontageBased
variables.description: If true, the delay for reloading will be based on the FPP arms reload montage, if false it will use the TPP reload to set the delay.

variables.name: UseReloadMontageDurationBasedDelay
variables.description: If true, the delay for reloading will be based on the FPP arms reload montage, if false it will use the TPP reload to set the delay.

variables.name: DelayUntilWeaponIsReloaded
variables.description: Requires Reload Montage Based Delay to be disabled.

variables.name: Use_Aiming_Custom_IK_ForFPS_LeftHand
variables.description: If you have pre-made animations for firing, the IK sometimes cause issues, as it tries to play the Montage and keep the IK at the same time, in that case you can disable it here.
